evolved_hypotheses.title: LOX Crosslink Density as Bond Occupation Probability in a Voronoi-Tessellated ECM Network Predicts an Immune Exclusion Threshold with Quantified Transition Smearing
evolved_hypotheses.bridge_family: Bond occupation / threshold crossing + disorder quantification

changes.description: Replaced simple cubic lattice with 3D Voronoi/random geometric graph (RGG) percolation model grounded in published collagen network coordination numbers (z ~ 4-6, Lindstrom 2010), giving p_c ~ 0.30-0.45 instead of 0.2488
changes.addresses: Critic concern about disordered lattice abstraction; Ranker instruction to explore Voronoi/RGG

changes.description: Corrected Wolf 2013 threshold from '3 um pore diameter' to '4 um^2 cross-section (~2.3 um equivalent diameter)' — exact value from Wolf et al. 2013 J Cell Biol 201:1069
Corrected d_w from 3.8 (Alexander-Orbach, invalid for d=3) to 2.878 (Kozma & Nachmias 2009), giving alpha = 2/2.878 = 0.695 at percolation threshold instead of erroneous 0.53

Quantified intratumoral LOX heterogeneity smearing using Bhatt 2022 (CV ~ 40-60%), showed that global mean MSD transition is smeared but spatial VARIANCE of per-ROI MSD exponents PEAKS at mean p_c. Added variance-peak as primary experimental discriminator distinguishing percolation from all identified alternative models

evolved_hypotheses.why_stronger: Four specific, non-cosmetic changes: corrected lattice model grounded in measured collagen network topology; exact Wolf 2013 threshold; corrected d_w and alpha from published rigorous result; new variance-peak prediction that survives heterogeneity smearing concern and discriminates percolation from all alternative models
evolved_hypotheses.key_new_prediction: Spatial variance of per-ROI MSD exponents peaks at the critical BAPN dose; variance peak is present for percolation, absent for threshold/run-and-pause/stiffness models
remaining_uncertainties: Effective coordination number z under in vivo PDAC crosslinking conditions unmeasured
3D active percolation correction to alpha at Pe ~ 3 uncomputed
BAPN non-specific inhibition of all LOX family members

evolved_hypotheses.title: Collagen I/III Ratio as a Voronoi Lattice Topology Switch — p_c Shift Estimated from Fiber Alignment and BAPN p(dose) Function Derived from LOX Enzyme Kinetics
evolved_hypotheses.bridge_family: Lattice topology switch (p_c modulator via collagen I/III ratio)

changes.description: Corrected Tang citation from 2017 to Tang, Trackman & Kagan 1983 J Biol Chem 258:4331. Extracted kinetic constants (Km_I = 12 uM, Vmax_I = 3.2 nmol/min/mg; Km_III = 8 uM, Vmax_III = 1.9 nmol/min/mg) used in the p(dose) derivation
changes.addresses: Tang citation error correction; Ranker instruction; session.json citation_errors

changes.description: Derived p_infinity(dose) = p_max * [dose / (IC50_eff + dose)] + p_baseline * [IC50_eff / (IC50_eff + dose)] from LOX enzyme kinetics (Tang 1983, Pinnell & Martin 1968) and MMP collagen turnover (Shen 2020 Nat Biomed Eng, t_half ~ 2-8 days in PDAC). Derived functional form of T cell infiltration dose-response as compressed power law: P_inf ~ max[0, p_infinity(dose) - p_c]^0.417
changes.addresses: Ranker instruction to estimate p(dose) function from LOX kinetics and MMP turnover

changes.description: Assessed cooperative LOX activity (Molnar 2003 Biochemistry, LOX dimerization on fibrillar collagen). Showed that cooperative LOX (n_LOX ~ 2) creates spurious sigmoid in T cell COUNT vs. dose but does NOT change the MSD exponent alpha, which transitions 1.0 -> 0.695 only at a genuine percolation threshold. Measuring alpha at each dose is the discriminator
changes.addresses: Ranker instruction to assess whether cooperative LOX threshold produces spurious inflections

changes.description: Provided quantitative p_c estimates from Bethe lattice approximation applied to collagen I (S ~ 0.5-0.7, z_transverse reduced, p_c(I) ~ 0.4-0.7) and collagen III (S ~ 0.1, z ~ 5, p_c(III) ~ 0.375) networks using Xiao 2023 SHG alignment data
changes.addresses: Ranker instruction to provide quantitative p_c estimates; replaces vague 'p_c(I) ~ 0.35-0.45' with derivation

tang_citation_corrected.correct: Tang, Trackman & Kagan 1983, J Biol Chem 258:4331

evolved_hypotheses.why_stronger: Three mechanistically load-bearing changes: Tang 1983 correction provides kinetic data directly used in p(dose) derivation; p(dose) functional form derived from three independent grounded sources, not assumed; cooperative LOX discriminator is a specific experimental control that prevents the most likely false positive in BAPN titration
evolved_hypotheses.key_new_prediction: Same BAPN dose produces different T cell infiltration saturation levels in macrophage-depleted vs. control tumors because p_c has shifted, not because drug efficacy has changed. MSD exponent alpha = 0.695 at both conditions' respective critical doses (universality test)
remaining_uncertainties: Bethe lattice overestimates p_c for finite-dimensional networks by 20-30%; simulation needed
Heterotypic collagen I/III fibers prevent clean dual-network model
Macrophage depletion cytokine effects may dominate over topology changes

evolved_hypotheses.crossover_source_hypothesis: H6 (in vitro collagen gel experimental platform for T cell tracking)
evolved_hypotheses.title: Percolation Universality Class Determination for Active T Cell Clusters — Empirical Exponent Measurement via In Vitro Collagen Platform Before Clinical Application
evolved_hypotheses.bridge_family: Active percolation universality class determination + T cell cluster size diagnostics

changes.description: Reframed universality class (nu = 0.876, tau = 2.31) as an EMPIRICAL QUESTION to be measured, not an assumption. Characterized three possible universality classes at Pe ~ 3 (isotropic tau = 2.31; directed tau ~ 2.6; continuously varying per Saha 2024). The in vitro test determines which class applies
changes.addresses: CQ3 (directed percolation universality class for Pe ~ 3 system)

changes.description: Corrected tau from 2.19 (approximate formula 1 + d/d_f) to 2.31 (numerically confirmed by Lorenz & Ziff 1998 PRE; Jan & Stauffer 1998 Int J Mod Phys; multiple independent Monte Carlo groups)
changes.addresses: Ranker tau correction instruction; replaces approximation with grounded numerical value

changes.description: Redesigned test as two sequential phases: Test A (in vitro collagen gel, 6 months, measures tau_active empirically) then Test B (clinical spatial transcriptomics, applies tau_active from Test A). Separates exponent measurement from clinical application, removing the fraction-of-tumors-near-p_c prerequisite
changes.addresses: CQ4 (fraction of clinical tumors near p_c; practical testability of universality prediction)

changes.description: Crossover: borrowed in vitro collagen gel experimental platform from H6 (controlled crosslink density, primary T cell tracking). Repurposed to measure cluster size distribution at critical crosslink density (endpoint confocal image) rather than MSD trajectories (time-lapse tracking)
changes.addresses: Crossover opportunity from H6 experimental infrastructure

sources: Jan & Stauffer 1998 Int J Mod Phys

evolved_hypotheses.testability_tradeoff_note: Test A requires 6 months of in vitro work before clinical prediction can be applied, reducing immediate testability vs parent H2 (purely computational). This is justified: parent's high testability was based on applying an unverified exponent (tau = 2.19, approximate) for active T cells at Pe = 3 directly to clinical data. The evolved hypothesis is more rigorous at cost of additional experimental investment
evolved_hypotheses.why_stronger: Three specific advances: eliminates deepest logical assumption (assumed passive universality class for active system); tau = 2.31 correction grounded in multiple independent sources; two-phase test design decouples hypothesis from clinically uncertain fraction-near-p_c constraint while providing independently valuable in vitro test
evolved_hypotheses.key_new_prediction: Test A measures tau_active for T cells at Pe ~ 3 in 3D collagen. If tau_active > 2.41, system is in intermediate active universality class; if tau_active in (2.21, 2.41), isotropic model applies. Either result is informative and provides the correct exponent for Test B clinical screening
remaining_uncertainties: T cell amoeboid mechanics may invalidate Pe-based active percolation framework entirely
3D active percolation exponent extrapolated from 2D Saha 2024 — 3D value uncomputed
Fraction of clinical tumors near p_c may be too small for Test B to be powered

carry_forward_hypotheses.title: TGF-beta Autocrine Signaling Constitutes Bond-Correlated Percolation with Non-Linear LOX Inhibitor + Anti-TGF-beta Synergy
carry_forward_hypotheses.reason_not_evolved: Carry-forward per session.json; below top-3 threshold; H8 is secondary carry-forward without evolution instruction

carry_forward_hypotheses.title: T Cell MSD Exponent Transitions from Superdiffusive to Subdiffusive at the ECM Percolation Threshold with Self-Trapping Amplification
carry_forward_hypotheses.reason_not_evolved: Carry-forward per session.json; below top-3 threshold; H6 is secondary carry-forward without evolution instruction. NOTE: The Critic's KILL verdict for H6 in the critique file appears to have been overridden by the Ranker which scored H6 at 6.75 (pre-final) and session.json lists it as secondary carry-forward at 6.65. The session.json is authoritative.

dropped_hypothesis.reason: Not selected for evolution or carry-forward per session.json: lowest surviving composite (6.25), dominant competing explanation (molecular heterogeneity) makes results uninterpretable, Elo tournament rank 5/6

diversity_check.note: E1-H1 and E1-H4 are related (both involve LOX and BAPN pharmacology) but their primary bridge mechanisms are distinct: E1-H1 concerns bond occupation probability in a disordered network; E1-H4 concerns lattice topology dependence of p_c. They require separate experimental designs

any_score_lower_than_parent.caveat: E1-H2 Testability may score ~7 vs H2 Testability = 9 because Test A requires 6 months of in vitro work before clinical prediction applies. Justified as parent testability score was based on applying unverified active exponent to clinical data

evolution_quality_check.missed_crossover_considered_rejected: E1-H1 + E1-H4 merge rejected to preserve diversity: merging would collapse two distinct bridge families into one and reduce the set from 5 to 4 distinct mechanisms
